findings.description: Page number artifacts in HTML content
findings.evidence: Page numbers appear as content in the HTML: '2020' (4x). These should be removed during conversion.

findings.description: Figure 12 (bar chart showing mid-year SAV % occurrence comparison between June and August) is missing from the HTML. No tag exists for this chart; instead, the axis labels and legend text are rendered as plain text.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 18 contains a bar chart labeled 'Figure 12. White Lake SAV % occurrence at mid-year monitoring events.' The HTML has only: '

100%, 80%, 60%, 40%, 20%, 0%
% Occurence
June August
Species: Tuckerman’s Pondweed, Spikerush...' followed by the figure caption, but no tag for the chart itself.
